overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired witcher character exploring a medieval castle at night. The character walks through torch-lit stone corridors, along high battlements overlooking a town, and down to a coastal cliff path leading toward a lighthouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: torch-lit castle corridor with central fire brazier

agents.ego_description: walking through a stone corridor holding a torch, passing a large central fire brazier

entered.detail: large circular stone brazier with flames in the center of the corridor
tall rectangular stone pillars lining the corridor walls
vaulted stone ceiling with wooden beam details
large square stone paving tiles covering the floor

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow stone corridor illuminated by a central fire brazier and wall torches. The enclosed space features tall stone pillars and an arched ceiling as the character walks forward toward a distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle battlements walkway with town overlook

events.description: character exits the covered corridor onto open-air castle battlements revealing night sky

agents.ego_description: walking out of the corridor onto the battlements, holding a torch aloft

notable_agents.action: armored guard walking with torch in the opposite direction

entered.detail: crenellated stone walls lining both sides of the walkway
dark teal night sky visible through the archway exit
medieval town buildings with lit windows visible in the distance below
burning torches mounted on the stone ramparts

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor onto open battlements, revealing a night sky and distant town below. A guard with a torch passes by on the left as the character continues along the stone walkway lined with crenellated walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated castle wall with main keep approach

agents.ego_description: walking along the high castle wall, approaching the main keep tower

notable_agents.action: guard standing watch near the stairs holding a torch

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower with lit windows and conical roof
wide stone staircase leading down visible ahead on the right

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the wide castle wall walkway, with the main keep tower looming ahead. The path is lined with burning torches and offers views of the town rooftops below to the left while approaching a staircase on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with grass and wooden structures

events.description: character descends wide stone stairs from the battlements to the lower courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs into a grassy courtyard area between buildings

entered.detail: grassy area with wildflowers and uneven terrain between stone structures
half-timbered wooden structure with stone foundation and sloped roof
wide stone staircase leading down from the wall to the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide stone staircase from the battlements into a grassy courtyard. The area features wooden buildings on the right and transitions from stone pavement to grass as the character approaches the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path leading to lighthouse

events.description: character leaves the castle courtyard and enters the narrow coastal cliff trail

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow dirt path on the coastal cliff edge toward a distant lighthouse

entered.detail: rocky cliff edge dropping steeply to the sea below
stone lighthouse with glowing beacon light on a rocky outcrop
dark ocean water visible far below the cliff edge
old weathered stone wall lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character follows a narrow dirt path along the coastal cliffs, with the ocean visible to the left and a stone lighthouse glowing in the distance ahead. The path is bordered by a stone wall on the right and wild grass on the cliff edge, ending as the character approaches stairs leading to a stone building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a castle corridor out onto the expansive, torch-lit battlements of a fortress at night. It begins within a narrow stone hallway defined by an arched ceiling and tall pillars, moving forward past a central fire brazier toward a distant exit. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens up to the open air of the battlements, revealing a dark night sky and the distant lights of a town below. The camera then continues along the crenellated stone walkway, passing a torch-bearing guard before the view expands to show the main keep tower looming ahead. Finally, the path follows the line of burning torches along the wide wall, glancing over the rooftops of the town to the left before approaching a staircase on the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from the heights of a medieval fortress down to a rugged coastal path. It begins with the character walking down a wide stone staircase from the battlements, passing wooden buildings as the stone pavement gives way to a grassy courtyard. As the character reaches the cliff edge, the scene shifts to a narrow dirt path bordered by a stone wall and wild grass, with the ocean opening up to the left. The camera then tracks forward along the coastline toward a glowing stone lighthouse in the distance before finally approaching a set of stairs leading to a stone building entrance.
